overall.description: A third-person perspective walkthrough of a futuristic cyberpunk city at night, likely from Cyberpunk 2077. The character moves from a covered neon-lit walkway through a street transition into an open plaza with wet reflective pavement, neon billboards, and scattered urban debris. The scene features ray-traced lighting, holographic advertisements, and a mix of commercial architecture.

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a covered pedestrian walkway with distinctive green flooring and overhead linear lighting. The camera follows a character walking forward through moderate pedestrian traffic. A red sports car passes by on the left side of the walkway around the 7-second mark. The environment is sheltered with neon-lit billboards visible in the distance.

segments.scene_description: The character exits the covered walkway and turns left onto a street-level sidewalk. The environment opens up to the sky with mixed lighting from street lamps and neon signs. The character walks across a distinctive red textured crosswalk section around 22 seconds, passing concrete pillars and approaching an overhead bridge structure.

segments.scene_description: The character enters an open plaza with wet reflective pavement that mirrors the surrounding neon lights. A prominent blue neon-lit storefront appears on the right, with people sitting on nearby benches. The ground is littered with debris and newspapers, and a central tree has trash accumulated around its base. The atmosphere shifts to a more open, slightly neglected urban space.

scene_state.functional_zone: deep plaza area with benches trees and graffiti walls

segments.scene_description: The character moves deeper into the plaza, passing the blue storefront which falls behind. The scene features more trees in concrete planters, graffiti-covered walls, and scattered benches where people sit. The wet pavement continues to reflect the ambient neon lighting from surrounding buildings and overhead structures.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered, neon-lit pedestrian corridor into a wide, rain-slicked urban plaza. It begins within a covered walkway featuring green flooring and linear overhead lights, moving through pedestrian traffic as a red sports car flashes past on the left. As the character exits the shelter and turns onto a street-level sidewalk, the environment opens to the night sky, passing concrete pillars and a red textured crosswalk beneath an overhead bridge. The scene then shifts into an expansive plaza where the pavement becomes wet and reflective, mirroring a prominent blue neon storefront and the surrounding city lights. Finally, the camera moves deeper into this neglected urban space, passing graffiti-covered walls and concrete planters filled with debris and scattered benches.
